title: Call us
text: We answer between 8am and 7pm East Africa Time (GMT+3), and we're used to calls from other time zones.

title: Visit the office
text: Village Market, Limuru Road, Gigiri — five minutes from the UN complex. Parking at gate B.

title: WhatsApp a consultant
text: The fastest way to reach us if you're still abroad. Send your dates and we'll reply with a shortlist.
